title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa, also known as woodland eyebright, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Orobanchaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa include its potential to soothe and calm the eyes, reduce inflammation and improve vision, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nemorosa typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, which can then be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
